Markwisesample.md

Nimbus — Product Brief

Overview

Nimbus is a collaborative notebook for small product teams who live in markdown. It ships by Q3 of next year.

The core promise is simple: write once, review anywhere. Reviewers comment inline, and an agent applies the edits to the prose so the document stays the single source of truth.

Market

The market is large and growing. Our wedge is teams already drafting specs in plain text, where the review loop today is copy-paste and lossy.

Pricing

We will charge a flat $12 per seat per month, billed annually.

Open Risks

Adoption hinges on the editor integrations landing on schedule.

ReplaceQ3 → Q4
Commentwrite once, review anywhere
Deletelarge and growing
